task: Move cloth to left edge of table in front of microwave.
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A light blue cloth is on a wooden table. The cloth is a flat, flexible textile. STRATEGY - The cloth must be moved to the left edge of the table. Since the cloth is on the table, it can be grasped directly from its body. The movement involves reaching, grasping, transporting, and placing. Failure modes include dropping the cloth during transport or placing it incorrectly. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the cloth body; Step 2 grasp the cloth body for secure hold; Step 3 transport to the left edge; Step 4 place on the table edge.
Goal: on(cloth, table); at(cloth, left_edge)
Scene: cloth, table
Step 1: reach(cloth)
  affordance_region: the body of the light blue cloth
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, cloth, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, cloth) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(cloth)
  affordance_region: the body of the light blue cloth
  contact: holding(cloth) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(cloth)
Step 3: transport(cloth -> table)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the left edge of the table
  spatial: above(cloth, table, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(cloth)
  done_when: above(cloth, table, 0.05)
Step 4: place(cloth -> table)
  affordance_region: the left edge of the table
  contact: surface_contact(cloth, table) [completion]; released(cloth) [completion]
  pose: at(cloth, left_edge) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(cloth, table) AND released(cloth)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the light blue cloth
the body of the light blue cloth
an empty area on the left edge of the table
the left edge of the table
